zh.Broome, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛 煙雨 歐克麗
zh.Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛 煙雨 歐克麗

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cornwallis Sr於1373年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛 煙雨 歐克麗時，他的父親Thomas Cornwallis40歲，母親Jane Hansard23歲。他於大約1398年與Philippa Buckton在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛 煙雨 歐克麗結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1436年在英國倫敦享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cornwallis Sr于1373年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可布洛 煙雨 歐克麗时，他的父亲Thomas Cornwallis40岁，母亲Jane Hansard23岁。他于大约1398年与Philippa Buckton在英国英格兰素福爾可布洛 煙雨 歐克麗结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1436年在英国倫敦享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Cornwallis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: regional name for someone from Cornwall, a Normanized form of Middle English Cornwalish. Compare Cornwall .

variants.name: Cornwall
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornish
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from the county of Cornwall, from Middle English Cornish, Cornysh formed on the analogy of English, which was usually Normanized as Corneys. Not surprisingly, the surname is common in adjacent Devon, but it is also established as far afield as Suffolk and London.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cornwallis Sr was born in 1373, in Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Cornwallis, was 40 and his mother, Jane Hansard, was 23. He married Philippa Buckton about 1398, in Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1436, in London, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cornwallis Sr est né en 1373, à Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Cornwallis, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Jane Hansard, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Buckton environ 1398, à Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1436, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1398 in Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Philippa Buckton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1436 im Alter von 63 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: John Cornwallis Sr(이)가 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브롬 위스 클리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cornwallis(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Hansard(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브롬 위스 클리에서 Philippa Buckton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1436년 영국 런던에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cornwallis Sr nasceu em 1373, em Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Cornwallis, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Jane Hansard, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Buckton aproximadamente 1398, em Brome with Oakley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1436, em London, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Of Broome, Suffolk, England: бром вит оакли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cornwallis Sr родился в 1373 г. в местности бром вит оакли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Cornwallis было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Hansard, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Buckton около 1398 г. в местности бром вит оакли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1436 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
